Document: # AI Laws - Make It Work Clause The station and its crew are expected to manage with the lawset that the Station A.I. and linked Silicons have started the round with. A.I. and Silicons are expected to intrepret their roundstart laws in good faith, and not use them as an excuse to self-antag. The Captain or RD may still change the A.I.'s lawsets, but should not do so at the beginning of the round solely because the laws are disliked. Adding definition to previous laws or uploading a custom lawset is still permissible.
